hero.description: Book courts, find compatible players and discover clubs across the country — straight from your phone.

brazil.headline: Padel grows 5x faster than any other sport in the country.
brazil.description: With over 2 million players and rapid growth in São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro, Brasília and Curitiba, padel has become the fastest-growing sport in Brazil.
brazil.fact1: 2nd most played racket sport in the world
brazil.fact2: Over 800 new clubs opened in the last 2 years
brazil.fact3: 67% of players are between 18 and 40 years old

clubs.headline: Top-rated clubs across the country
clubs.description: Verified venues, professional courts and a growing community of players at every level.

benefits.headline: A sport that transforms you on and off the court.
benefits.card1Desc: 45 minutes of padel equals 8 km of running in cardiovascular impact, with less strain on joints.
benefits.card2Desc: Always played in doubles. Every match is a real opportunity to meet new people.
benefits.card3Desc: A game of spatial awareness, anticipation, and fast decisions under pressure.
benefits.card4Desc: From your very first game to a regional tournament, padel adapts to your pace. The learning curve is the shortest among racket sports.

players.headline: Never play without a partner again.
players.description: Kora connects players by skill level, location and availability. Build your ideal pair or join an open match.
players.feature1: Filter by level: beginner, intermediate, and advanced
players.feature2: Match history and ratings from other players
players.feature3: Notifications for open slots near you
players.feature4: Groups and tournaments organised by clubs

access.headline: Truly accessible.
access.description: No barrier — technical, geographic or financial — should stop anyone from playing padel.
access.f1Text: Available across Brazil, with new partner clubs added every week.
access.f2Text: From your first ever game to a regional tournament — everyone is welcome.
access.f3Text: Protected payments and free cancellation up to 2 hours before the match.
access.f4Text: Pick a court, choose a time and confirm. No queues, no phone calls.

howto.headline: From idea to court in 3 steps.
howto.s1Text: Quick sign-up with Google, Apple or email. No long forms, no hassle.
howto.s2Text: Filter by city, club, time and match type. See real-time availability.
howto.s3Text: Confirm, pay and show up. Invite partners or join an open match.

cta.headline: Ready to play?
cta.description: Join thousands of players who already book, connect and play through Kora.

contact.headline: Let's talk
contact.subline: Questions about courts, clubs, or partnerships? We read every message and respond within hours.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's on your mind...
contact.consentText: I agree that my information may be shared with Kora's verified partner clubs to respond to my request.
contact.successBody: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.errConsent: You must accept this to send.
contact.infoPrivacy: We take data privacy seriously. Your information is never sold or shared beyond what you've consented to.

footer.tagline: Book courts. Find players. Play more.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Powered by Zenko. All rights reserved.

banner.headline: We use cookies
banner.description: We and our partners use cookies to improve your experience, analyze traffic, and serve personalized content.

modal.title: Privacy Preferences
modal.subtitle: Choose which cookies you allow. Preferences can be updated at any time via Cookie Settings in the footer.

necessary.title: Strictly Necessary
necessary.description: These cookies are required for the platform to function and cannot be disabled. They are typically set in response to actions you take — logging in, filling forms, or setting language. You can block them via your browser, but parts of the site will not work.

functional.title: Functional
functional.description: These cookies allow the site to remember your preferences and provide enhanced, personalised features such as your UI theme or last court search filters. Disabling them may affect how some features work.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with Kora by collecting anonymised usage data. This helps us improve the platform and measure feature performance. No personally identifiable information is collected.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.description: These cookies track your browsing activity to help advertisers show you more relevant ads on other sites. They may also limit how often you see an ad and measure campaign effectiveness. Disabling them will not reduce ad volume, only relevance.

cookieData.n1Purpose: Stores the encrypted authentication session token required for secure login
cookieData.n2Purpose: Maintains user session state and identity across page loads
cookieData.n3Purpose: Stores the user's preferred language (en / pt) for consistent navigation
cookieData.n4Purpose: Protects against cross-site request forgery (CSRF) attacks on form submissions
cookieData.f1Purpose: Remembers the user's preferred UI theme (dark or light mode)
cookieData.f2Purpose: Saves the last court search filters to improve speed on return visits
cookieData.a1Purpose: Registers a unique ID used to generate anonymised statistical data about site usage
cookieData.a2Purpose: Persists session state and measures overall session engagement on the platform
cookieData.a3Purpose: Sets a unique user ID used for session recording and heatmap analysis
cookieData.m1Purpose: Used by Facebook to deliver targeted advertising and track ad conversion events
cookieData.m2Purpose: Used by Google Ads to measure and attribute conversions from advertising campaigns
